prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7186→7551→8633→5273→5294，2024年大幅前移约3360名后，2025年基本持平于5294名，近两年稳定在5300附近，显示该校在辽宁省 物理类考生中的吸引力明显回升；2021–2025年物理类本省计划分别为1098→877→877→877→877人，2021年后大幅缩减并稳定在877人；2026年计划888人， 较2025年小幅扩招约1.25%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名第28名（2021–2026年稳定在28 –32名区间），属于国内顶尖工科院校之一；2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及投档线异常信号），但影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平 台有一定曝光；历史投档异常记录中2023年电信学部曾出现位次断档，但2024–2025年已明显恢复；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达10个：化学工程与技术A+、 力学A、土木工程A、机械工程A、工商管理A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-，工科实力突出，对物理类考生有较强吸引 力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度匹配；辽宁省2026年高考总报名约20万人，物理类 按近年比例估算约14.3万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争环境稳定；大连理工大学位于辽宁省大连市，为本省985高校，在 辽宁省招生占比高（2025年本省招生约51人，占全国总招生约8.5%），本省考生报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次稳定回升趋势、2026年小幅扩招（竞争略 加剧）以及工科专业持续高热对报考的拉动作用，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年5294名基础上略有前移；预测最低位次约5284名，区间4784–5784名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7186 → 7551 → 8633 → 5273 → 5294. In 2024, it significantly moved forward by about 3360 places, and in 2025 it remained essentially flat at 5294, stabilizing near 5300 in the past two years, indicating a clear recovery in attractiveness among Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 1098 → 877 → 877 → 877 → 877, with a significant reduction after 2021 and stabilization at 877. The 2026 plan is 888, a slight expansion of about 1.25% compared to 2025, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 28th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese Universities (stable in the 28–32 range from 2021 to 2026), belonging to one of the top engineering institutions in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving abnormal signals in admission scores), but the impact is limited. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms. In historical admission anomalies, the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering experienced a ranking gap in 2023, but it has significantly recovered in 2024–2025. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 10 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of Liaoning Province college entrance examination registrants is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,000 based on recent proportions, essentially flat compared to 2025, with a stable competitive environment. Dalian University of Technology is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, as a provincial 985 university, with a high proportion of enrollment in Liaoning Province (in 2025, provincial enrollment was about 51, accounting for about 8.5% of total national enrollment), and provincial candidates have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable recovery trend in rankings from 2024–2025, the slight expansion in 2026 (slightly intensified competition), and the continued high popularity of engineering majors driving applications, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 ranking of 5294. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5284, with a range of 4784–5784.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5284, range 4784–5784. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the range (5784) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Innovation Class/Top Talent Class); candidates with rankings between 4800–5300 should primarily fill Tier 2 moderate difficulty majors; candidates with rankings after 5300 can focus on Tier 3 majors as safety options, among which Chemical Engineering and Civil Engineering, though with average social popularity, have excellent discipline evaluations and high cost-effectiveness.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2088 → 1669 → 1733 → 1790 → 1897. After a significant forward shift in 2022, it has been continuously moving backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 228 positions in the last 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1897, showing a slow backward trend.
2. [Enrollment Plan] From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 76 → 65 → 65 → 59 → 58 people, gradually decreasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 58 people, unchanged from 2025, with no further reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 28th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science. However, the university is known for engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is negative (abnormal signal in admission scores), but mainly related to the Physics Category. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 55th (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-high level. The university has no A- or above discipline evaluations in liberal arts, and the History Category enrollment majors (Journalism and Communication, Philosophy, English, Japanese, Public Administration, Architecture) are not its strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of liberal arts-related majors is divided: Law is divided and waiting, Teacher Education is divided and waiting, Foreign Languages is generally waiting. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Liaoning Province is estimated at about 57,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025 (56,300), leading to a small increase in competition. Dalian University of Technology is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, as a provincial 985 university, it has some regional appeal to local History Category candidates, but the selection of liberal arts majors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in rankings in recent years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in History Category candidates, and the generally weak appeal of the university's liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to move slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 1897. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1927, with a range of 1696–2158.

Candidates with rankings within 1700 are advised to aim for Tier 1 Journalism and Communication or Philosophy; candidates with rankings between 1700–2000 should focus on Tier 2 Public Administration or English; candidates with rankings above 2000 may consider Tier 3 Japanese or Architecture as a safety option.
